title: tontanea glabra
intro: Tontanea glabra, also known as Calea glabra, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe and calm the body and mind. The health benefits of Tontanea glabra include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used as a natural remedy for insomnia and restlessness.
